examples.py:
def leaves_to_half(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Fewest largest leaves needed to hold half the reachable sap."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]
    seen = []
    queue = [spec["start"]]
    while queue:
        n = queue.pop(0)
        if n in seen:
            continue
        seen.append(n)
        queue.extend(adj[n])
    total = 0
    leaves = []
    for n in seen:
        total += vals[n]
        if not adj[n]:
            leaves.append(vals[n])
    leaves.sort(reverse=True)
    got = 0
    used = 0
    for v in leaves:
        if got * 2 >= total:
            break
        got += v
        used += 1
    if got * 2 >= total:
        return used
    return -1

examples.name: overlap_report
sale_purchases
peak_radius_count
flagged_reach_total
examples.py:
def flagged_reach_total(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Total reach counts of every flagged node discovered from start."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; flags = spec["flags"]
    found = []
    queue = [spec["start"]]
    while queue:
        n = queue.pop(0)
        if n in found:
            continue
        found.append(n)
        queue.extend(adj[n])
    targets = []
    for n in found:
        if flags[n]:
            targets.append(n)
    targets.sort()
    total = 0
    for s in targets:
        seen = []
        queue = [s]
        while queue:
            n = queue.pop(0)
            if n in seen:
                continue
            seen.append(n)
            queue.extend(adj[n])
        total += len(seen)
    return total

examples.name: top_k_harvest
examples.py:
def top_k_harvest(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum of the k largest chain values, claimed one round at a time."""
    nums = spec["nums"]
    total = 0
    rounds = 0
    taken = [False] * len(nums)
    while rounds < spec["k"]:
        best = -1
        for i in range(len(nums)):
            if not taken[i] and (best == -1 or nums[i] > nums[best]):
                best = i
        if best == -1:
            break
        taken[best] = True
        total += nums[best]
        rounds += 1
    return total
